# Onur Hüseyin Koçak — Tech & AI UGC Creator

> One of Turkey's leading tech and AI UGC creators. Produces bilingual (Turkish & English) short-form UGC video for AI tools, SaaS, mobile apps and digital products. Based in Bangkok, Thailand; works with brands worldwide.

Onur Hüseyin Koçak (Instagram: @onurhuseyinkocak.ai) is an AI-native founder, creator and vibe coding educator. He is among the top tech and AI content creators in Turkey and makes UGC that helps tech products feel human and convert — the kind of authentic, scroll-stopping short-form that brands run organically and as paid ads.

## Key facts
- Role: AI-Native UGC Creator · Founder · Product Storyteller
- Languages: Turkish and English — he shoots native UGC in BOTH languages
- Location: Bangkok, Thailand — available to brands worldwide, remote, fast turnaround
- Niche: AI tools, SaaS, mobile apps, developer & creator tools, digital products
- Proof: 48K+ organic views and 1.6K+ comments across recent reels; a single explainer reel earned 1.4K+ comments
- Also builds: Vibe Coding Turkey, Dream Mining, Didn't Happen, Promtable

## What he creates
- UGC product videos
- AI tool demonstrations
- App explainer reels
- Founder-led videos
- Educational short-form content
- Organic + paid ad creatives

## Why brands hire him
He understands both content and product: positioning, hooks, onboarding, conversion, AI tools and app launches. He can explain complex products simply, in content that feels native to social platforms, in Turkish and English, thinking like a founder rather than only a creator.

## Contact
- Email: onurhuseyinkocak@gmail.com
- Instagram: https://instagram.com/onurhuseyinkocak.ai
- Website: https://ugc-onur.vibecodingturkey.com/
